The '''Tinn system''', also known as '''Echnos system''', contained [[Tinn VI]]. Located at the limit of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], it was a common stopover point for [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] en route to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

{{System-stub}}
